title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: Apify MCP Connectors are a set of Model Context Protocol integrations that significantly enhance the capabilities of the Hermes Agent by providing expanded tool access and functionality.
writeup: This video covers Apify MCP Connectors, a set of Model Context Protocol integrations, and how they extend the Hermes Agent with expanded tool access and added functionality. It matters because the Model Context Protocol standardizes how agents connect to external tools and APIs, and the connectors apply that approach to broaden what a single agent can do. The concrete takeaway: pairing Apify's MCP integrations with Hermes adds tooling and API integration that increases the agent's reach.
